result.stderr:
Ivet 1.8.4+96f6b120eeabe19cb7c9dc0b74efecd6fa264adb
Copyright (C) 2026 david.lecoconnier

  --ip             (Default: localhost) Server IP

  --port           (Default: 8182) Server Port

  --dir            Directory where to find dlls. If not set look in current
                   working directory

  --output         Directory where to put migration file. If not set files are
                   created in current directory

  --sprintno       Sprint/Version number of this new migration

  --ssl            (Default: false) Use SSL/TLS for JanusGraph connection

  --dry-run        (Default: false) Preview migration without writing files

  -v, --verbose    (Default: false) Enable verbose logging (debug level)

  --onefile        (Default: false) Create one file per script

  --description    Description to be added in generated script

  --help           Display this help screen.

  --version        Display version information.
